title: Phuket Heat Wave
lead: Phuket is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.09. Temperatures are extremely high, reaching a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Phuket is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 9.8 GG. 
 The high humidity of 84% is making the heat feel even more oppressive, while the wind speed of 13.0 km/h is providing little relief. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating that the heat wave is having a significant impact on the city.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
